cleavage agent: digested for 16 h with trypsin gold (Promega, Madison, WI) or GluC endopeptidase
instrument: analyzed on a Q Exactive (ThermoFisher Scientific, Bremen, Germany) instrument
labeling: Using iTRAQ-based Terminal Amine Isotopic Labeling of Substrates (TAILS)
reduction reagent: Next, cell extracts were reduced with 3.5 mM TCEP
reduction concentration: Next, cell extracts were reduced with 3.5 mM TCEP
